name: lutrin-vscode
description: Write presentations in Markdown: live slide preview, deck diagnostics with quick fixes, brand kits, Marp compatibility and one-click PowerPoint (.pptx) export.

badges.description: CI — tests on Linux, macOS and Windows
The same compiler as a CLI, on npm

virtualWorkspaces.description: The compiler runs in a Node worker against real files (images, fonts, brand kits).

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Preview, diagnostics and export work. Settings that point at files to load or packages to install are read from user settings only.

lutrin.files.description: Glob of the Markdown files automatically treated as presentations (diagnostics without opening the preview). A "deck: true" frontmatter, or opening the preview by hand, has the same effect.

lutrin.debounceMs.description: Delay (ms) between a keystroke and recompiling the preview.

lutrin.defaultKit.markdownDescription: This editor's default kit for decks that name none (the name of a kit installed in `~/.config/lutrin/kits/`, the path of a kit directory, the path of a `.json` file, or `none` for the generic theme). Empty = the kit embedded in the extension, if there is one. The document always wins: the frontmatter `kit:`, the project default (`package.json`) and the user default (`lutrin config`, shared across tools) all take precedence over this setting.

lutrin.updateUrl.description: For VSIX installations distributed outside the Marketplace only — the Marketplace updates itself. https URL of the internal update manifest (latest.json, generated by "npm run vsix" — http URLs are refused, and the manifest's sha256 digest is verified before installation). Empty = checking disabled. The extension checks on activation, then once a day, and through the "Check for Updates" command.

walkthroughs.title: Get started with Lutrin
walkthroughs.description: Write a presentation in Markdown, watch it compose beside the text, export a PowerPoint anyone can retouch.

steps.title: Create your first deck
steps.description:
A presentation is a Markdown file — one # heading per slide, the engine lays it out.
[New Presentation](command:lutrin.newDeck)

steps.title: Preview while you type
steps.description:
The panel recompiles as you type and follows your cursor from slide to slide.
[Show Preview](command:lutrin.showPreview)

steps.title: Let the deck doctor underline problems
steps.description: Overflowing slides, unknown layouts, unresolved images: diagnostics appear on the exact line, most with a one-click fix.

steps.title: Export to PowerPoint
steps.description:
The .pptx is fully editable — text stays text, shapes stay shapes.
[Export to PowerPoint](command:lutrin.exportPptx)

steps.title: Put your brand on it
steps.description:
A brand kit (colors, fonts, logos, layouts) restyles every deck without touching the Markdown.
[Read about kits](https://github.com/julien-riel/lutrin#readme)

author: Julien Riel
